title: UPI OC No 207 FY 24 25 – Auto replenishment of NETC FASTag and RuPay NCMC with UPI AutoPay
text:
Neel

NPCI/UPI/OC-207/2024-25 23" September 2024

To,

Members - Unified Payments Interface (UPI}
Members — NETC FASTag

Members — RuPay

Auto-replenishment of NETC FASTag and RuPay NCMC with UPI Autopay

Dear Madam / Sir,

UPI Autopay covers recurring needs such as recurring bill payments, OTT subscriptions, loan
EMI payments, and other scenarios where periodicity of payment is well-defined.

To further enhance customer experience in various use cases which are recurring in nature
but without any fixed periodicity,

1. Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced to facilitate e-mandate framework for
auto-replenishment of balances in NETC FASTag and RuPay National Common
Mobility Card (NCMC) in “Statement on Developmental and Regulatory Policies”
dated 07 June 2024.

2. Further, it was directed:

a) To include auto-replenishment of NETC FASTag and RuPay NCMC, as and
when the balance falls below a threshold set by the customer, under the e-
mandate framework.

b) Exemption from 24-Hours prior Pre-Debit Notification (PDN) for auto-
replenishment of NETC FASTag and RuPay NCMC

in the Circular RBI/2024-25/64 CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S528/02-14-003/2024-25 issued
by Reserve Bank of India (RBI), dated 22" August 2024

3. All other instructions provided under the e-mandate framework shall continue to
remain applicable

In line with the above communications, the auto-replenishment of NETC FASTag (MCC 4784)
and RuPay NCMC (MCC 7412) is permitted without 24-hrs Pre-Debited Notification under

1OOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10% Floor,
Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.

T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101 www.npci.org.in
CIN: U74990MH2008NPL189067

contact@npci.org.in


N=CIp

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

UPI Autopay framework. Ail UPI Members shall remove the PDN validation for any UPI

Autopay execution only for the mentioned MCCs.

NETC FASTag and RuPay NCMC Issuer Banks to ensure that the auto-replenishment done
under exception of Pre-Debit Notification as per the said guidelines shall be used only for the
intended purposes of NETC FASTag and RuPay NCMC only.

All UPI remitter banks, Payer PSP Banks, and concerned ecosystem stakeholders shall
implement the same with immediate effect. This directive must be communicated to all

relevant stakeholders for appropriate actions.

Thanking You,
SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia

Chief of Producis
